sentences.target: Ich brauche heute die Crème für mein Gesicht.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə ˈhɔʏ̯tə diː kʁeːm fyːɐ̯ maɪ̯n ɡəˈzɪçt/

translations.de: Ich brauche heute die Crème für mein Gesicht.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə ˈhɔʏ̯tə diː kʁeːm fyːɐ̯ maɪ̯n ɡəˈzɪçt/
translations.en: I need the cream for my face today.
translations.fr: J’ai besoin de la crème pour le visage aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi ho bisogno della crema per il viso.
translations.ru: Мне сегодня нужен крем для лица.
translations.pt: Preciso do creme para o rosto hoje.
translations.he: אני צריך היום את קרם הפנים.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi cần kem dưỡng da mặt.
translations.nl: Ik heb vandaag de gezichtscrème nodig.
translations.uk: Мені сьогодні потрібен крем для обличчя.
translations.hi: मुझे आज चेहरे की क्रीम चाहिए.
translations.id: Saya butuh krim wajah hari ini.
translations.ro: Am nevoie de crema pentru față astăzi.
translations.da: Jeg har brug for ansigtscremen i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は顔用のクリームが必要です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; main verb selecting an accusative object ('die Crème') and a prepositional phrase ('für mein Gesicht').
Temporal adverb; modifies the verb, indicating time.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative here; introduces the direct object noun 'Crème'.
Common noun, feminine singular, accusative; direct object of 'brauche'.
Preposition governing accusative; marks purpose/beneficiary.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; agrees with 'Gesicht' (neuter), accusative due to 'für'.
Common noun, neuter singular, accusative; object of the preposition 'für'.

sentences.target: Die Crème liegt auf dem Tisch.

translations.de: Die Crème liegt auf dem Tisch.
translations.en: The cream is on the table.
translations.es: La crema está sobre la mesa.
translations.fr: La crème est sur la table.
translations.pt: O creme está em cima da mesa.
translations.el: Η κρέμα είναι πάνω στο τραπέζι.
translations.ja: クリームはテーブルの上にある。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular nominative; introduces the subject noun 'Crème'.
Common noun, feminine singular, nominative; subject of 'liegt'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive positional verb. Takes a locative PP 'auf dem Tisch'.
Two-way preposition; here with dative to express location.
Definite article, masculine singular dative; modifies 'Tisch' as object of 'auf'.
Common noun, masculine singular, dative; object of the preposition 'auf'.

sentences.target: Er mischt Crème fraîche in die Suppe.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ mɪʃt kʁeːm fʁɛʃ ɪn diː ˈzʊpə/

translations.de: Er mischt Crème fraîche in die Suppe.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ mɪʃt kʁeːm fʁɛʃ ɪn diː ˈzʊpə/
translations.en: He mixes crème fraîche into the soup.
translations.es: Él mezcla crema fresca en la sopa.
translations.fr: Il mélange de la crème fraîche à la soupe.
translations.it: Lui mescola la crème fraîche nella zuppa.
translations.ko: 그는 수프에 크렘 프레슈를 넣어 섞어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他把法式鲜奶油拌进汤里。
translations.yue: 佢將法式酸忌廉撈入湯入面。
translations.pt: Ele mistura crème fraîche na sopa.
translations.vi: Anh ấy trộn crème fraîche vào súp.
translations.nl: Hij roert crème fraîche door de soep.
translations.hi: वह सूप में क्रेम फ्रेश मिलाता है.
translations.pl: On miesza crème fraîche do zupy.
translations.nb: Han blander crème fraîche i suppen.
translations.id: Dia mencampurkan crème fraîche ke dalam sup.
translations.sv: Han rör ner crème fraîche i soppan.
translations.ro: El amestecă crème fraîche în supă.
translations.da: Han rører crème fraîche i suppen.
translations.ja: 彼はスープにクレーム・フレーシュを混ぜる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, masculine singular, nominative; subject.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, taking the direct object 'Crème fraîche' and a directional PP 'in die Suppe'.
Common noun, feminine singular, accusative; head of the direct object NP.
Adjective (loan from French), feminine singular, accusative; attributive modifier in the fixed expression 'Crème fraîche'.
Two-way preposition; here with accusative to indicate direction into a destination.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; modifies 'Suppe' as object of 'in'.
Common noun, feminine singular, accusative; object of the preposition 'in'.

sentences.target: Die Crème hilft sofort bei trockenen Händen.
sentences.reading: /diː kʁeːm hɪlft zoːˈfɔʁt baɪ̯ ˈtʁɔkənən ˈhɛndn̩/

translations.de: Die Crème hilft sofort bei trockenen Händen.
translations.ipa: /diː kʁeːm hɪlft zoːˈfɔʁt baɪ̯ ˈtʁɔkənən ˈhɛndn̩/
translations.en: The cream helps right away with dry hands.
translations.es: La crema alivia de inmediato la sequedad de las manos.
translations.fr: La crème soulage immédiatement la sécheresse des mains.
translations.it: La crema allevia subito la secchezza delle mani.
translations.ko: 그 크림은 건조한 손에 바로 효과가 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这款润肤霜对干燥的手立刻见效。
translations.yue: 呢支潤膚霜對乾燥嘅手即刻有幫助。
translations.ru: Этот крем сразу помогает при сухих руках.
translations.pt: O creme alivia imediatamente as mãos secas.
translations.tr: Krem kuru ellere hemen iyi geliyor.
translations.vi: Kem giúp tay khô đỡ ngay lập tức.
translations.nl: De crème helpt meteen tegen droge handen.
translations.uk: Крем одразу допомагає від сухості рук.
translations.hu: A krém azonnal segít a száraz kezeken.
translations.hi: क्रीम सूखे हाथों पर तुरंत असर करती है.
translations.pl: Krem od razu pomaga na suche dłonie.
translations.el: Η κρέμα ανακουφίζει αμέσως τα ξηρά χέρια.
translations.nb: Kremen hjelper mot tørre hender med en gang.
translations.id: Krim itu langsung membantu mengatasi tangan kering.
translations.sv: Krämen hjälper direkt mot torra händer.
translations.cs: Krém hned pomáhá na suché ruce.
translations.da: Cremen hjælper med det samme mod tørre hænder.
translations.ja: そのクリームは乾いた手にすぐ効く。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular nominative; introduces the subject noun 'Crème'.
Common noun, feminine singular, nominative; subject of 'hilft'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive, commonly used with a dative complement/PP.
Temporal adverb; modifies the verb, indicating immediacy.
Preposition governing dative; marks context/condition ('bei trockenen Händen').
Attributive adjective in dative plural (-en); modifies 'Händen' and agrees in number/case.
Common noun, dative plural; object of the preposition 'bei'.

Lui mescola la crème fraîche nella zuppa.

Kremen hjelper mot tørre hender med en gang.
